message.content:
Sure, here is the alignment of the code with the transcript entries based on the context provided:

```json
[
    {
        "text": "considered a medium problem really I'll",
        "code": [
            "class Solution {",
            "    public int numIslands(char[][] grid) {",
            "        int count = 0;",
            "        for (int i = 0; i < grid.length; i++) {",
            "            for (int j = 0; j < grid[i].length; j++) {",
            "                if (grid[i][j] == '1') {",
            "                    count++;",
            "                    callBFS(grid, i, j);",
            "                }",
            "            }",
            "        }",
            "        return count;",
            "    }"
        ]
    },
    {
        "text": "I'll give it a thumbs up but yeah thank you",
        "code": [
            "    public void callBFS(char[][] grid, int i, int j) {",
            "        if (i < 0 || i >= grid.length || j < 0 || j >= grid[i].length || grid[i][j] == '0') {",
            "            return;",
            "        }",
            "        grid[i][j] = '0';",
            "        callBFS(grid, i + 1, j); // up",
            "        callBFS(grid, i - 1, j); // down",
            "        callBFS(grid, i, j - 1); // left",
            "        callBFS(grid, i, j + 1); // right",
            "    }",
            "}"
        ]
    }
]
```
